info.title: Visor Public API
info.summary: Vehicle listings, facets, VIN, and dealer data for API customers.
info.description: Public beta API for customer integrations. Normal /v1 endpoints require Authorization: Bearer <api_key>. API keys are scoped to API accounts; usage is metered per request and billed from the account ledger. The OpenAPI document is available without authentication at /v1/openapi.json.
info.x-cli-description: Query Visor vehicle listings, facets, VIN detail, and dealer inventory from a scriptable CLI.

parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Page size as an integer string. Defaults to 50; maximum 100.

parameters.description: Page size as an integer string. Defaults to 50; maximum 100.

parameters.name: offset

schema.description: Zero-based page offset as an integer string. Defaults to 0.

parameters.description: Zero-based page offset as an integer string. Defaults to 0.

parameters.name: sort

schema.description: Sort order. Use field names with optional - for descending, for example price or -price. Defaults to days_on_market, which returns newest listings first. discount returns best discount from MSRP first. distance requires postal_code or latitude and longitude.

parameters.description: Sort order. Use field names with optional - for descending, for example price or -price. Defaults to days_on_market, which returns newest listings first. discount returns best discount from MSRP first. distance requires postal_code or latitude and longitude.

parameters.name: fields

schema.description: Comma-separated public listing summary fields to return. id and vin are always returned. Use default to include the default listing summary fieldset plus selected extras. Unknown fields are rejected. Supported fields: default, id, vin, year, make, model, trim, exterior_color, interior_color, base_exterior_color, base_interior_color, msrp, price, miles, days_on_market, status, inventory_status, inventory_type, stock_number, vdp_url, dealer_id, dealer_name, city, state, latitude, longitude, distance_miles, photo_urls.

parameters.description: Comma-separated public listing summary fields to return. id and vin are always returned. Use default to include the default listing summary fieldset plus selected extras. Unknown fields are rejected. Supported fields: default, id, vin, year, make, model, trim, exterior_color, interior_color, base_exterior_color, base_interior_color, msrp, price, miles, days_on_market, status, inventory_status, inventory_type, stock_number, vdp_url, dealer_id, dealer_name, city, state, latitude, longitude, distance_miles, photo_urls.

parameters.name: make

schema.description: Comma-separated make names or slugs, for example toyota,honda.

parameters.description: Comma-separated make names or slugs, for example toyota,honda.

parameters.name: model

schema.description: Comma-separated model names or slugs. Combine with make when possible for narrower results.

parameters.description: Comma-separated model names or slugs. Combine with make when possible for narrower results.

parameters.name: state

schema.description: Comma-separated two-letter dealer states, for example CA,TX.

parameters.description: Comma-separated two-letter dealer states, for example CA,TX.

parameters.name: dealer_id

schema.description: Comma-separated dealer UUIDs. Accepts up to 50 dealer IDs and uses dealer-filtered listing metering.

parameters.description: Comma-separated dealer UUIDs. Accepts up to 50 dealer IDs and uses dealer-filtered listing metering.

parameters.name: dealer_type

schema.description: Comma-separated dealer types, for example franchise,independent.

parameters.description: Comma-separated dealer types, for example franchise,independent.

parameters.name: in_transit

schema.description: Whether to return in-transit/build inventory or only stock inventory.

parameters.description: Whether to return in-transit/build inventory or only stock inventory.

parameters.name: inventory_type

schema.description: Comma-separated inventory classes such as new,used,certified.

parameters.description: Comma-separated inventory classes such as new,used,certified.

parameters.name: assembly_location

schema.description: Pipe-separated assembly locations. Uses | because locations often contain commas.

parameters.description: Pipe-separated assembly locations. Uses | because locations often contain commas.

parameters.name: keywords

schema.description: Comma-separated listing keyword tokens. Positive tokens must be present; negative history tokens are excluded.

parameters.description: Comma-separated listing keyword tokens. Positive tokens must be present; negative history tokens are excluded.

parameters.name: vin_pattern

schema.description: Comma-separated VIN masks, up to 10 distinct patterns. VIN characters match themselves, ? matches one VIN position, and * is allowed only at the end. Short masks are treated as prefixes, for example 1HG or 1HGCM826*.

parameters.description: Comma-separated VIN masks, up to 10 distinct patterns. VIN characters match themselves, ? matches one VIN position, and * is allowed only at the end. Short masks are treated as prefixes, for example 1HG or 1HGCM826*.

parameters.name: exclude_assembly_location

schema.description: Plus-separated assembly locations to exclude. Uses + to match the private API separator.

parameters.description: Plus-separated assembly locations to exclude. Uses + to match the private API separator.

parameters.name: exclude_base_exterior_color

schema.description: Comma-separated normalized exterior colors to exclude.

parameters.description: Comma-separated normalized exterior colors to exclude.

parameters.name: exclude_base_interior_color

schema.description: Comma-separated normalized interior colors to exclude.

parameters.description: Comma-separated normalized interior colors to exclude.

parameters.name: exclude_options_packages

schema.description: Comma-separated manufacturer option/package codes to exclude.

parameters.description: Comma-separated manufacturer option/package codes to exclude.

parameters.name: inventory_status

schema.description: Inventory mode. active is the default; sold searches historical sold inventory.

parameters.description: Inventory mode. active is the default; sold searches historical sold inventory.

parameters.name: sold_within_days

schema.description: Positive integer day window for sold inventory, for example 30. Cannot be combined with snapshot_date.

parameters.description: Positive integer day window for sold inventory, for example 30. Cannot be combined with snapshot_date.

parameters.name: snapshot_date

schema.description: Historical active-inventory snapshot date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Cannot be combined with sold inventory filters.

parameters.description: Historical active-inventory snapshot date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Cannot be combined with sold inventory filters.

schema.description: Minimum listed price in whole dollars.

parameters.description: Minimum listed price in whole dollars.

parameters.name: max_price

schema.description: Maximum listed price in whole dollars.

parameters.description: Maximum listed price in whole dollars.

parameters.name: min_msrp

schema.description: Minimum combined MSRP in whole dollars.

parameters.description: Minimum combined MSRP in whole dollars.

parameters.name: max_msrp

schema.description: Maximum combined MSRP in whole dollars.

parameters.description: Maximum combined MSRP in whole dollars.

parameters.name: latitude

schema.description: Search origin latitude for sort=distance, distance_miles, and radius filtering.

parameters.description: Search origin latitude for sort=distance, distance_miles, and radius filtering.

parameters.name: longitude

schema.description: Search origin longitude for sort=distance, distance_miles, and radius filtering.

parameters.description: Search origin longitude for sort=distance, distance_miles, and radius filtering.

parameters.name: postal_code

schema.description: US ZIP/postal search origin for sort=distance, distance_miles, and radius filtering.

parameters.description: US ZIP/postal search origin for sort=distance, distance_miles, and radius filtering.

parameters.name: radius

schema.description: Maximum distance from the search origin, in miles. Requires postal_code or latitude and longitude. Maximum 500.

parameters.description: Maximum distance from the search origin, in miles. Requires postal_code or latitude and longitude. Maximum 500.

parameters.name: bbox

schema.description: Map viewport as west,south,east,north. Cannot be combined with radius. Maximum diagonal is 1000 miles.

parameters.description: Map viewport as west,south,east,north. Cannot be combined with radius. Maximum diagonal is 1000 miles.

id.description: Stable listing identifier for this inventory record.

trim.description: Trim or package label when available.

msrp.description: Combined MSRP in whole dollars when available.

price.description: Listed price in whole dollars. Null when unavailable or reported as zero.

days_on_market.description: Days the listing has been observed on market when available.

status.description: Public listing availability classification for this collection result.

inventory_status.description: Deprecated alias for status, retained for beta compatibility.

inventory_type.description: Vehicle inventory class such as new, used, or certified.

vdp_url.description: Vehicle detail page URL when available.

dealer_id.description: Dealer UUID associated with the listing.

distance_miles.description: Distance from postal_code or latitude/longitude when supplied; otherwise null.

photo_urls.description: Listing photo URLs, ordered with the primary image first when available.

items.description: Public listing summary returned by listing collection endpoints.

limit.description: Maximum number of records requested for this page. Collection endpoints default to 50 and cap at 100.

offset.description: Zero-based offset used to fetch this page.

total.description: Exact count for the same filters at request time. Use as a paging aid rather than a durable snapshot.

next_offset.description: Offset for the next page, or null when there are no more records.

pagination.description: Offset pagination metadata returned by collection endpoints.

meta.description: Reserved metadata object. It is empty for the beta contract unless an endpoint documents otherwise.

X-Usage-Class.description: Metering class used for the request, for example listing_search, facet_counts_historical, vehicle_detail_enriched, or dealer_lookup.

X-Usage-Cost-Micros.description: Usage cost for this request in integer USD micros. 1000000 micros equals 1 USD.

X-Pricing-Version.description: Pricing catalog version UUID used to calculate the request cost.

X-RateLimit-Tier.description: Effective account Usage Tier code used for rate limiting.

X-RateLimit-Limit-10s.description: Maximum requests allowed in the 10-second burst window.

X-RateLimit-Remaining-10s.description: Remaining requests in the current 10-second burst window after this request.

X-RateLimit-Limit-60s.description: Maximum requests allowed in the 60-second sustained window.

X-RateLimit-Remaining-60s.description: Remaining requests in the current 60-second sustained window after this request.

400.description: Invalid path or query parameter. Unknown query parameters are rejected.

401.description: Missing, malformed, or invalid Authorization bearer token.

402.description: The API account is blocked by billing state or prepaid balance.

403.description: The API key is valid but does not include the required scope.

429.description: The API account exceeded the public API rate limit. Retry-After is included when available.

503.description: The platform could not price, meter, rate-limit, or fetch data for the request.

get.description: Returns active, sold, or historical snapshot listing summaries using stable snake_case fields. Public inventory is deduplicated by VIN and assigned to the dealer Freeway believes owns the listing, so dealer-scoped counts can differ from raw dealer feed counts. Unknown filters fail closed with a validation_error.

parameters.name: facets

schema.description: Required comma-separated facet names to return. Supported facets: make, model, inventory_type, year, trim, version, base_exterior_color, exterior_color, base_interior_color, interior_color, seating_capacity, doors, engine, state, drivetrain, assembly_location, assembly_country, transmission, fuel_type, body_type, cylinders, dealer_type, in_transit, options_packages, features, keywords, price, msrp, miles, days_on_market.

parameters.description: Required comma-separated facet names to return. Supported facets: make, model, inventory_type, year, trim, version, base_exterior_color, exterior_color, base_interior_color, interior_color, seating_capacity, doors, engine, state, drivetrain, assembly_location, assembly_country, transmission, fuel_type, body_type, cylinders, dealer_type, in_transit, options_packages, features, keywords, price, msrp, miles, days_on_market.

parameters.name: facet_value_limit

schema.description: Maximum number of values returned per categorical facet. Defaults to 20; maximum 100. Numeric range facets always return fixed buckets.

parameters.description: Maximum number of values returned per categorical facet. Defaults to 20; maximum 100. Numeric range facets always return fixed buckets.

parameters.name: metric

schema.description: Facet Metric used to compute an optional per-bucket aggregate. Defaults to count. Supported non-count metrics use <measure>.<aggregate>, for example price.p95 or days_on_market.median. Non-count metrics require exactly one categorical facet.

parameters.description: Facet Metric used to compute an optional per-bucket aggregate. Defaults to count. Supported non-count metrics use <measure>.<aggregate>, for example price.p95 or days_on_market.median. Non-count metrics require exactly one categorical facet.

parameters.name: sort

schema.description: Facet bucket ordering. Defaults to -count. Sorting by metric requires a non-count metric.

parameters.description: Facet bucket ordering. Defaults to -count. Sorting by metric requires a non-count metric.

total.description: Total matching records for the supplied filters.

count.description: Number of matching records for the value.

name.description: Selected Facet Metric name, for example price.p95.

value.description: Facet Metric value, or null when suppressed by the minimum sample-size rule.

null_reason.description: Reason the Facet Metric value is null.

metric.description: Selected non-count Facet Metric for this bucket.

name.description: Display name for enriched option package buckets.

msrp.description: Median MSRP for enriched option package buckets when available.

avg_price.description: Median listed price for this bucket when option sort enrichment is enabled internally.

avg_days_on_lot.description: Median days on lot for this bucket when option sort enrichment is enabled internally.

avg_discount.description: Median discount from MSRP for this bucket when option sort enrichment is enabled internally.

facets.description: Categorical facet buckets keyed by facet name, ordered by count descending.

min.description: Inclusive lower bound for this numeric bucket.

max.description: Exclusive upper bound for this numeric bucket.

count.description: Number of matching records in the bucket.

buckets.description: Numeric buckets ordered by min ascending.

range_facets.description: Numeric facet buckets keyed by facet name.

min.description: Minimum value for the matching records.

max.description: Maximum value for the matching records.

count.description: Number of matching records with a non-null value.

missing.description: Number of matching records missing this value.

mean.description: Mean value for the matching records.

median.description: Median value for the matching records.

stddev.description: Sample standard deviation for the matching records.

additionalProperties.description: Stats for a numeric facet field.

stats.description: Numeric stats keyed by range facet name.

data.description: Facet counts and numeric ranges for the supplied filters.

facets.description: Facet names requested and returned, after default expansion.

metric.description: Facet Metric used for this response. Defaults to count.

sort.description: Facet bucket ordering used for this response.

minimum_metric_count.description: Minimum bucket count required before non-count metric values are returned.

get.description: Returns categorical facets, numeric range facets, and stats for an explicit listing filter surface facet selection. Use facets=make,model,price. Supported facets: make, model, inventory_type, year, trim, version, base_exterior_color, exterior_color, base_interior_color, interior_color, seating_capacity, doors, engine, state, drivetrain, assembly_location, assembly_country, transmission, fuel_type, body_type, cylinders, dealer_type, in_transit, options_packages, features, keywords, price, msrp, miles, days_on_market.

schema.description: Comma-separated optional expansions. Supported values are price_history and options.

parameters.description: Comma-separated optional expansions. Supported values are price_history and options.

inventory_type.description: Inventory classification such as new or used.

vdp_url.description: Vehicle detail page URL when available.

vhr_url.description: Vehicle history report URL when available.

photo_urls.description: Listing photo URLs. Included by default.

photo_url_primary.description: Primary listing photo URL when available.

inventory_date.description: Date the listing entered inventory when available.

last_checked_at.description: Last warehouse observation timestamp for this listing.

dealer_id.description: Dealer UUID associated with the VIN's current or latest listing.

dealer.description: Dealer attached to a VIN detail response.

status.description: Public VIN availability classification for this listing's vehicle.

window_sticker_verified.description: Whether the window sticker was verified for this VIN.

base_msrp.description: Base MSRP in whole dollars when available.

combined_msrp.description: Base MSRP plus installed options in whole dollars when available.

msrp.description: Option MSRP in whole dollars when available.

items.description: VIN option decoded from option codes.

options.description: Installed options when include=options is requested and option data is available; otherwise null.

build.description: Build and specification fields for a VIN.

vehicle.description: Vehicle facts attached to a listing detail response.

price_before.description: Previous listed price in whole dollars.

price_after.description: New listed price in whole dollars.

price_history.description: Price history when include=price_history is requested; otherwise null.

meta.description: Reserved metadata object. It is empty for the beta contract unless an endpoint documents otherwise.

get.description: Returns listing-centered detail by listing_id. Missing listings return 404 not_found_error.

anyOf.description: Latest known listing for the VIN, whether active, missing, or sold.

latest_listing.description: Latest known listing for this VIN, or null when listing evidence is unavailable or ambiguous.

window_sticker_verified.description: Whether the window sticker was verified for this VIN.

get.description: Returns the current or latest known record for a VIN. Missing VINs return 404 not_found_error.

schema.description: Case-insensitive dealer name or website domain search string.

makes.description: Represented franchise makes. Empty when unavailable or not applicable.

listing_count.description: Current active listing count for the dealer after VIN-level listing deduplication and ownership assignment.

get.description: Returns dealer summaries ordered by active listing count. Listing counts use VIN-level listing deduplication and ownership assignment, so they can differ from raw dealer feed counts. Use state and q to narrow results.

website.description: Dealer website as an absolute URL when available.

makes.description: Represented franchise makes. Empty when unavailable or not applicable.

listing_count.description: Current active listing count for the dealer.

line1.description: Dealer street address line when available.

meta.description: Reserved metadata object. It is empty for the beta contract unless an endpoint documents otherwise.

X-Usage-Class.description: Metering class used for the request, for example listing_search, facet_counts_historical, vehicle_detail_enriched, or dealer_lookup.

X-Usage-Cost-Micros.description: Usage cost for this request in integer USD micros. 1000000 micros equals 1 USD.

X-Pricing-Version.description: Pricing catalog version UUID used to calculate the request cost.

X-RateLimit-Tier.description: Effective account Usage Tier code used for rate limiting.

X-RateLimit-Limit-10s.description: Maximum requests allowed in the 10-second burst window.

X-RateLimit-Remaining-10s.description: Remaining requests in the current 10-second burst window after this request.

X-RateLimit-Limit-60s.description: Maximum requests allowed in the 60-second sustained window.

X-RateLimit-Remaining-60s.description: Remaining requests in the current 60-second sustained window after this request.

400.description: Invalid path or query parameter. Unknown query parameters are rejected.

401.description: Missing, malformed, or invalid Authorization bearer token.

402.description: The API account is blocked by billing state or prepaid balance.

404.description: The requested VIN or dealer detail resource was not found.

get.description: Returns one dealer summary by dealer_id. Missing dealers return 404 not_found_error.

parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Page size as an integer string. Defaults to 50; maximum 100.

parameters.description: Page size as an integer string. Defaults to 50; maximum 100.

parameters.name: offset

schema.description: Zero-based page offset as an integer string. Defaults to 0.

parameters.description: Zero-based page offset as an integer string. Defaults to 0.

parameters.name: sort

schema.description: Sort order. Use field names with optional - for descending, for example price or -price. Defaults to days_on_market, which returns newest listings first. discount returns best discount from MSRP first. distance requires postal_code or latitude and longitude.

parameters.description: Sort order. Use field names with optional - for descending, for example price or -price. Defaults to days_on_market, which returns newest listings first. discount returns best discount from MSRP first. distance requires postal_code or latitude and longitude.

parameters.name: fields

schema.description: Comma-separated public listing summary fields to return. id and vin are always returned. Use default to include the default listing summary fieldset plus selected extras. Unknown fields are rejected. Supported fields: default, id, vin, year, make, model, trim, exterior_color, interior_color, base_exterior_color, base_interior_color, msrp, price, miles, days_on_market, status, inventory_status, inventory_type, stock_number, vdp_url, dealer_id, dealer_name, city, state, latitude, longitude, distance_miles, photo_urls.

parameters.description: Comma-separated public listing summary fields to return. id and vin are always returned. Use default to include the default listing summary fieldset plus selected extras. Unknown fields are rejected. Supported fields: default, id, vin, year, make, model, trim, exterior_color, interior_color, base_exterior_color, base_interior_color, msrp, price, miles, days_on_market, status, inventory_status, inventory_type, stock_number, vdp_url, dealer_id, dealer_name, city, state, latitude, longitude, distance_miles, photo_urls.

parameters.name: make

schema.description: Comma-separated make names or slugs, for example toyota,honda.

parameters.description: Comma-separated make names or slugs, for example toyota,honda.

parameters.name: model

schema.description: Comma-separated model names or slugs. Combine with make when possible for narrower results.

parameters.description: Comma-separated model names or slugs. Combine with make when possible for narrower results.

parameters.name: state

schema.description: Comma-separated two-letter dealer states, for example CA,TX.

parameters.description: Comma-separated two-letter dealer states, for example CA,TX.

parameters.name: dealer_id

schema.description: Comma-separated dealer UUIDs. Accepts up to 50 dealer IDs and uses dealer-filtered listing metering.

parameters.description: Comma-separated dealer UUIDs. Accepts up to 50 dealer IDs and uses dealer-filtered listing metering.

parameters.name: dealer_type

schema.description: Comma-separated dealer types, for example franchise,independent.

parameters.description: Comma-separated dealer types, for example franchise,independent.

parameters.name: in_transit

schema.description: Whether to return in-transit/build inventory or only stock inventory.

parameters.description: Whether to return in-transit/build inventory or only stock inventory.

parameters.name: inventory_type

schema.description: Comma-separated inventory classes such as new,used,certified.

parameters.description: Comma-separated inventory classes such as new,used,certified.

parameters.name: assembly_location

schema.description: Pipe-separated assembly locations. Uses | because locations often contain commas.

parameters.description: Pipe-separated assembly locations. Uses | because locations often contain commas.

parameters.name: keywords

schema.description: Comma-separated listing keyword tokens. Positive tokens must be present; negative history tokens are excluded.

parameters.description: Comma-separated listing keyword tokens. Positive tokens must be present; negative history tokens are excluded.

parameters.name: vin_pattern

schema.description: Comma-separated VIN masks, up to 10 distinct patterns. VIN characters match themselves, ? matches one VIN position, and * is allowed only at the end. Short masks are treated as prefixes, for example 1HG or 1HGCM826*.

parameters.description: Comma-separated VIN masks, up to 10 distinct patterns. VIN characters match themselves, ? matches one VIN position, and * is allowed only at the end. Short masks are treated as prefixes, for example 1HG or 1HGCM826*.

parameters.name: exclude_assembly_location

schema.description: Plus-separated assembly locations to exclude. Uses + to match the private API separator.

parameters.description: Plus-separated assembly locations to exclude. Uses + to match the private API separator.

parameters.name: exclude_base_exterior_color

schema.description: Comma-separated normalized exterior colors to exclude.

parameters.description: Comma-separated normalized exterior colors to exclude.

parameters.name: exclude_base_interior_color

schema.description: Comma-separated normalized interior colors to exclude.

parameters.description: Comma-separated normalized interior colors to exclude.

parameters.name: exclude_options_packages

schema.description: Comma-separated manufacturer option/package codes to exclude.

parameters.description: Comma-separated manufacturer option/package codes to exclude.

parameters.name: inventory_status

schema.description: Inventory mode. active is the default; sold searches historical sold inventory.

parameters.description: Inventory mode. active is the default; sold searches historical sold inventory.

parameters.name: sold_within_days

schema.description: Positive integer day window for sold inventory, for example 30. Cannot be combined with snapshot_date.

parameters.description: Positive integer day window for sold inventory, for example 30. Cannot be combined with snapshot_date.

parameters.name: snapshot_date

schema.description: Historical active-inventory snapshot date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Cannot be combined with sold inventory filters.

parameters.description: Historical active-inventory snapshot date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Cannot be combined with sold inventory filters.

parameters.name: min_price

schema.description: Minimum listed price in whole dollars.

parameters.description: Minimum listed price in whole dollars.

parameters.name: max_price

schema.description: Maximum listed price in whole dollars.

parameters.description: Maximum listed price in whole dollars.

parameters.name: min_msrp

schema.description: Minimum combined MSRP in whole dollars.

parameters.description: Minimum combined MSRP in whole dollars.

parameters.name: max_msrp

schema.description: Maximum combined MSRP in whole dollars.

parameters.description: Maximum combined MSRP in whole dollars.

parameters.name: latitude

schema.description: Search origin latitude for sort=distance, distance_miles, and radius filtering.

parameters.description: Search origin latitude for sort=distance, distance_miles, and radius filtering.

parameters.name: longitude

schema.description: Search origin longitude for sort=distance, distance_miles, and radius filtering.

parameters.description: Search origin longitude for sort=distance, distance_miles, and radius filtering.

parameters.name: postal_code

schema.description: US ZIP/postal search origin for sort=distance, distance_miles, and radius filtering.

parameters.description: US ZIP/postal search origin for sort=distance, distance_miles, and radius filtering.

parameters.name: radius

schema.description: Maximum distance from the search origin, in miles. Requires postal_code or latitude and longitude. Maximum 500.

parameters.description: Maximum distance from the search origin, in miles. Requires postal_code or latitude and longitude. Maximum 500.

parameters.name: bbox

schema.description: Map viewport as west,south,east,north. Cannot be combined with radius. Maximum diagonal is 1000 miles.

parameters.description: Map viewport as west,south,east,north. Cannot be combined with radius. Maximum diagonal is 1000 miles.

id.description: Stable listing identifier for this inventory record.

trim.description: Trim or package label when available.

msrp.description: Combined MSRP in whole dollars when available.

price.description: Listed price in whole dollars. Null when unavailable or reported as zero.

days_on_market.description: Days the listing has been observed on market when available.

status.description: Public listing availability classification for this collection result.

inventory_status.description: Deprecated alias for status, retained for beta compatibility.

inventory_type.description: Vehicle inventory class such as new, used, or certified.

vdp_url.description: Vehicle detail page URL when available.

dealer_id.description: Dealer UUID associated with the listing.

distance_miles.description: Distance from postal_code or latitude/longitude when supplied; otherwise null.

photo_urls.description: Listing photo URLs, ordered with the primary image first when available.

items.description: Public listing summary returned by listing collection endpoints.

limit.description: Maximum number of records requested for this page. Collection endpoints default to 50 and cap at 100.

offset.description: Zero-based offset used to fetch this page.

total.description: Exact count for the same filters at request time. Use as a paging aid rather than a durable snapshot.

next_offset.description: Offset for the next page, or null when there are no more records.

pagination.description: Offset pagination metadata returned by collection endpoints.

meta.description: Reserved metadata object. It is empty for the beta contract unless an endpoint documents otherwise.

get.description: Returns listing summaries scoped to one dealer after VIN-level listing deduplication and ownership assignment. If a dealer feed contains a VIN that Freeway attributes to another dealer, that VIN may not appear here. Supports the listing filter and pagination surface.

parameters.name: start_date

schema.description: Inclusive UTC start date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to 29 days before end_date.

parameters.description: Inclusive UTC start date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to 29 days before end_date.

parameters.name: end_date

schema.description: Inclusive UTC end date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to today.

parameters.description: Inclusive UTC end date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to today.

parameters.name: metering_class

schema.description: Optional comma-separated metering classes to include.

parameters.description: Optional comma-separated metering classes to include.

date.description: UTC usage date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

metering_class.description: Metering class for this daily usage bucket.

requests.description: Billable request count in this bucket.

charged_micros.description: Total charged USD micros in this bucket.

data.description: Daily usage buckets ordered by date and metering class.

requests.description: Total billable requests in the response range.

charged_micros.description: Total charged USD micros in the response range.

start_date.description: Inclusive UTC start date used for the summary.

end_date.description: Inclusive UTC end date used for the summary.

source.description: Analytics source table used for the summary.

schema.description: Public API usage summary response envelope.

get.description: Returns daily billable usage totals for the authenticated API account. Usage analytics are eventually consistent with the billing ledger and are intended for customer dashboards and reconciliation.

HttpApiDecodeError.description: The request did not match the expected schema

_tag.description: The tag identifying the type of parse issue

path.description: The path to the property where the issue occurred

message.description: A descriptive message explaining the issue

Issue.description: Represents an error encountered while parsing a value to match the schema

anyOf.description: an object to be decoded into a globally shared symbol

bearerAuth.description: Send API keys as Authorization: Bearer <api_key>. Query-string API keys are rejected.
